location: Little St. James Island, U.S. Virgin Islands
text: Pool renovation underway at Little St. James Island — contractor coordinating with Epstein staff, Nov 2011
Jeffrey Epstein personally requests helicopter to Southampton, Aug 31 2011
Epstein associate in Paris discusses potential assistant candidates directly with Epstein, Sep 2012
PBPD investigation began 2005 after parents of 14-year-old complained Epstein paid her for a massage; guilty plea followed in 2008
Maxwell authorized a $2.5M wire transfer from her Manhattan residence at 116 East 65th St on May 3, 2016
